ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Opere di M. Sperone Speroni degli Alvarotti
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Tratte da MSS originali. Tomo secondo.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: He mentions listening to the Discorso in the Accademia degli Elevati in Padua. He writes Zacco about the attempt to re-create the Accademia degli Elevati. Giraldi`s letter was sent to the Prince of the Academy. For a critical edition of Giraldi`s letter, see Christina Roaf (1982). A ms version in British Library, Add. 12038, ff. 185r-189r, with date 27 December 1558.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Con licenza de` superiori, e privilegio.

Essay.EssayTitle: Discorso del lattare i figliuoli dalle madri
Al magn(ifico) Signor Bartolomeo Zacco in Padova. 16 January 1563

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
